title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: Cerid-AI/cerid-ai
summary: Self-hosted, privacy-first AI Knowledge Companion — RAG-powered retrieval, intelligent agents, and extensible SDK

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor - Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 16 LLM providers, 17 channels, 112+ MCP tools, 5-tier memory, A2A protocol, knowledge vault, voice, browser automation, Computer-use, self-healing, self-improving. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: siddsachar/Thoth
summary: Thoth - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: jarod-rosenthal/workermill
summary: Open-source AI coding team with multi-expert orchestration

title: flackynmr1/Commit-AI
summary: 🤖 Elevate your Git history with AI-generated Conventional Commits that convert technical changes into clear, professional documentation.

title: Afifmutaz/ClauseCopilot
summary: 📄 Analyze vendor contracts effortlessly with ClauseCopilot, providing risk assessments, summaries, and negotiation language for informed decisions.

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

title: mrostamii/tooti
summary: Decentralized AI inference protocol; coordination, routing, and economics over libp2p, with an OpenAI-compatible gateway.

title: niansahc/ember-2
summary: A local, private personal intelligence system. Not a chatbot.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: vecnode/fastapi-ollama-orchestrator
summary: FastAPI agent orchestration server with OpenAI-compatible chat endpoints and running short multi-turn debate using Ollama.

title: h-network/h-cli
summary: AI-powered network infrastructure management — SSH, NETCONF, NetBox, EVE-NG. Asimov Firewall (dual-LLM safety). Self-hosted, self-learning. Built with 8 parallel AI agent teams.

title: sundar139/Explainable-Credit-Risk-Modeling-with-Alternative-Data-and-Local-LLMs
summary: Explainable credit risk modeling on the Home Credit dataset with LightGBM/CatBoost, SHAP/LIME, Ollama-based reporting, and API deployment.

title: aommi/applycling
summary: Your clingy job-search companion. Tailors your resume to job descriptions with a local Ollama LLM.

title: Basaltlabs-app/Gauntlet
summary: Deterministic behavioral benchmark for LLMs. 109 probes, 16 categories, no LLM-as-judge. Tests sycophancy resistance, instruction decay, temporal coherence, confidence calibration, and more.

title: vybhav72954/CVonRAG
summary: RAG-powered resume bullet optimizer — upload your CV, paste a job description, and get polished, character-validated resume bullets. 100% local, 100% free.

title: pogo899GX/nl-eval-observability-feedback-loops
summary: 🔍 Demonstrate evaluation, observability, and feedback loops for production AI systems with a clear, minimal C# console app example.

title: REDEVL4/linkedin-outreach-agent
summary: Natural LinkedIn replies, recruiter responses, and connection outreach with browser automation and local or cloud LLMs

title: BitConcepts/specsmith
summary: Applied Epistemic Engineering toolkit · AEE agent sessions · execution profiles · FPGA/HDL governance · tool installer · 50+ CLI commands · Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/Ollama
